page: Amazon Web Services c8gd.24xlarge is a compute-optimized server powered by the AWS Graviton ARMv9 Neoverse-V2 processor. Operating on the Nitro hypervisor, this instance features 96 dedicated physical cores running at 2.8 GHz with a 1:1 thread-to-core ratio. The memory configuration provides 192.0 GB of RAM, translating to 2.0 GB per core. Local storage is bundled with 5700 GB of NVMe SSD capacity, and the network interface delivers a baseline bandwidth of 40 Gbps.

Benchmark data indicates top-tier multi-core performance. The server achieves top 10% placement in multi-core stress-ng tests, multi-threaded bzip3 decompression, and Geekbench multi-core scores. Memory bandwidth is highly efficient, scoring in the top 10% for both cached small-block reads and uncached large-block read/write operations. Database operations and Redis SET benchmarks also rank in the top 10%, alongside static web serving throughput. Single-core performance is strong, placing in the top 25% for Geekbench single-core and PassMark CPU tests.

The c8gd.24xlarge offers high resource density for compute-heavy workloads that benefit from local NVMe storage. The ARM64 architecture delivers high multi-core efficiency, though single-core execution and certain LLM prompt processing tasks perform in the average tier. This server is suited for high-throughput database operations, multi-threaded software compilation, static web serving, and memory-intensive data processing.
description: Amazon Web Services c8gd.24xlarge is an ARM64 compute-optimized server utilizing the Nitro hypervisor and AWS Graviton ARMv9 Neoverse-V2 processors. It features 96 dedicated physical cores running at 2.8 GHz, 192.0 GB of RAM, and 5700 GB of local NVMe SSD storage. The network interface provides a baseline bandwidth of 40 Gbps. In benchmark testing, the instance demonstrates top-tier multi-core CPU performance, high memory bandwidth, and exceptional database and Redis throughput. Single-core execution and software compilation also rank highly. This server is designed for compute-intensive workloads, high-performance database operations, and static web serving that require fast local storage and high multi-threaded efficiency.

tagline: An ARM64 compute-optimized platform featuring ninety-six dedicated cores and high-capacity local NVMe storage for demanding multi-threaded workloads.

Equipped with 192.0 GB of RAM and 5700 GB of local NVMe SSD storage
